description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola Zero can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The exterior is predominantly black with a glossy finish, adorned with the iconic red and white Coca-Cola logo and the word 'Zero' in bold white letters. The can displays detailed nutritional information and ingredients in white text on a black background, along with a silver pull tab on the top. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with no visible dents, rust, or damage. The can's branding and label design are crisp and easily recognizable, making it stand out as a familiar beverage container. The object is empty, lightweight, and likely to be found as litter in urban environments.
description: A glossy black Coca-Cola Zero can with red and white branding, silver pull tab, and detailed nutritional labeling. The can is undamaged and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Coca-Cola Zero logo with a dynamic swoosh design and part of the label's text.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detailed nutrition facts and ingredients list in white text on a black background.
description_view_2: Another front-angled view focusing on the Coca-Cola Zero branding and the can's smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_3: Rear-side view with a clear display of the nutrition facts and a partial view of the logo and label graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: Red and white Coca-Cola script logo with a dynamic swoosh, accompanied by the word 'Zero' in bold white letters.
